parameters.name: only_confirmed
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return only confirmed results; set to `false` to return both confirmed and unconfirmed results. Cannot be used simultaneously with `only_unconfirmed`. (Default: `false`)

parameters.name: only_unconfirmed
